ogTitle: Gaffneys Creek vs Gannawarra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gaffneys Creek and Gannawarra.
heading: Gaffneys Creek vs Gannawarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gaffneys Creek, Victoria and Gannawarra, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gannawarra has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Gaffneys Creek (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gaffneys Creek or Gannawarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gaffneys Creek has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Gannawarra scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gaffneys Creek scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Gannawarra scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gaffneys Creek or Gannawarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gannawarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
